item.description: I am Tushar, currently a post-doctoral research associate at the The Univeristy of Edinburgh. I am working with Dr. Adam A. Stokes on sensing and data science solutions for the Oil & Gas industries under the ORCA (Offshore Robotics for Certification of Assets) project. My research area lies at the junction of machine learning, robotics, internet of things, and decenentralisation. Recently, I have picked up an interest on applying Transfer Learning and Federated Computing across industrial IoT applications.
